extension.description: A VS Code extension for cleaning up Git branches (detect and delete dead/stale/gone branches, with full branch management).
command.openCleaner.title: Git Sohji: Open
command.queue.execute.title: Execute Deletion Queue
command.queue.clear.title: Clear Deletion Queue
command.queue.removeItem.title: Remove from Deletion Queue
view.deletionQueue.name: Deletion Queue
config.title: Git Sohji
config.baseBranch.description: Base branch for merged-branch detection. Set to `auto` to use `origin/HEAD`, or fallback to `main` / `master` / `develop`.
config.staleDays.description: Number of days since last commit to consider a branch as stale.
config.autoFetchPrune.description: Run `git fetch --prune` automatically before detecting gone branches.
config.protectedBranches.description: Branches excluded from delete, rename, and merge-source actions. Supports glob patterns (e.g., `release/*`).
config.confirmBeforeDelete.description: Show confirmation dialog before delete operations.
config.forceDeleteLocal.description: Use `git branch -D` (force) instead of `git branch -d` when deleting local branches.
config.allowRemoteBranchDeletion.descrip: Enable remote branch deletion buttons and cleanup.
config.includeRemoteInDeadCleanup.descri: Also delete corresponding remote branches when cleaning up local branches.
config.showStatusBadges.description: Show merged/stale/gone status badges in the branch list.
No Git repository found. Open a folder o: No Git repository found. Open a folder or initialize Git.
Git was not found on your PATH. Please i: Git was not found on your PATH. Please install Git and reload the window.
A branch name cannot end with '.' or '/': A branch name cannot end with '.' or '/'.
'@{' is not allowed in branch names.
A branch name cannot start with '-'.
Merging a branch into itself is not allo: Merging a branch into itself is not allowed.
Protected branches cannot be selected as: Protected branches cannot be selected as the merge source.
Protected branches cannot be deleted rem: Protected branches cannot be deleted remotely.
Name: Name
Author: Author
HEAD: HEAD
Merged into a parent branch but not the: Merged into a parent branch but not the base branch. Excluded from cleanup because git cannot safely delete it yet.
{0} branches are not fully merged. Force: {0} branches are not fully merged. Force delete them?
Also delete {0} remote branches with sam: Also delete {0} remote branches with same name (not tracked)?
These remote branches will be deleted: {: These remote branches will be deleted: {0}
Not fully merged — enable force delete (: Not fully merged — enable force delete (-D) to remove it.
This branch is checked out and cannot be: This branch is checked out and cannot be deleted.
The remote branch no longer exists.
The remote rejected the deletion (protec: The remote rejected the deletion (protected branch or server hook).
Could not reach the remote (authenticati: Could not reach the remote (authentication or permission error).
This is the current branch — switch away: This is the current branch — switch away before deleting it.
Another Git process is holding a lock on: Another Git process is holding a lock on this ref. Try again in a moment.
Could not connect to the remote — check: Could not connect to the remote — check your network connection.
{0} is the current branch. Switch to {1}: {0} is the current branch. Switch to {1} and delete it?
No other branch to switch to. Configure: No other branch to switch to. Configure a base branch in settings.
Tracking refs updated. {0} was already r: Tracking refs updated. {0} was already removed on the remote.
Delete {0} branches? This cannot be undo: Delete {0} branches? This cannot be undone.
Plus up to {0} matching remote branches: Plus up to {0} matching remote branches on the server.
Remote branch deletion is disabled in se: Remote branch deletion is disabled in settings.
Open Git Sohji first to set the reposito: Open Git Sohji first to set the repository.
Force delete {0}? Unmerged commits will: Force delete {0}? Unmerged commits will be lost.
